notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the xorg-x11-server SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 14 CVEs: CVE-2023-1393, CVE-2023-5367, CVE-2023-5380, CVE-2023-6377, CVE-2023-6478, and 9 more.
